apps.name: Feather
apps.versionDescription:
Thank you for all your feedback and contributions!

> [!TIP]
> For `idevice` configuration, you can use [Impactor](https://github.com/claration/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing!

## What's Changed
* Added support for using remote pairing on 17.4+, for 17.3 and below, use a standard pairing file.
* Added more recommended sources by @CelloSerenity in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/585
* Added option to inject into all available extensions within an app by @waruhachi in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/592

## New Contributors
* @waruhachi made their first contribution in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/592

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/compare/v2.6.0...v2.7.0
apps.localizedDescription: CLARATION 的 Feather 客户端，轻量强大的侧载工具。

versions.localizedDescription:
Thank you for all your feedback and contributions!

> [!TIP]
> For `idevice` configuration, you can use [Impactor](https://github.com/claration/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing!

## What's Changed
* Added support for using remote pairing on 17.4+, for 17.3 and below, use a standard pairing file.
* Added more recommended sources by @CelloSerenity in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/585
* Added option to inject into all available extensions within an app by @waruhachi in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/592

## New Contributors
* @waruhachi made their first contribution in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/592

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/compare/v2.6.0...v2.7.0

apps.name: Kazumi
apps.versionDescription:
- 重新设计的历史记录页面 (@Predidit)
- 新增 Android 平台画中画支持 (#1910) (@yaoyaozijing)
- 新增BGM评论GIF支持 (@Predidit)
- 修复包含特殊字符的番剧标题的检索问题 (#1945) (@Predidit)
- 修复特定情况下系统媒体控制面板不显示进度条的问题 (@Predidit)
- 现在 windows 平台第一次启动可以选择创建快捷方式 (@WingChunWong)
- 其他UI改进 (@Predidit)
- 轮换示例规则 (@Predidit)
apps.localizedDescription: Kazumi 是一款基于手机端的番剧搜索与播放工具。

versions.localizedDescription:
